description: Known-ground-truth recording fixtures. The committed source of truth the real-stack regression harness (tests/test_fixtures_regression.py) asserts against. Human-readable ground truth and the populate steps live in manifest.md.

clips.name: passage-clean
clips.reference: The three brothers thought about the weather. They walked through the thick forest and found a very old ship near the river.

clips.name: passage-degraded
clips.reference: The three brothers thought about the weather. They walked through the thick forest and found a very old ship near the river.

expected.transcript: Last weekend, I have gone to the beach with my friend. Me and my friend was very excited about the trip. We drive there for about 3 hours. The weather was very nice and there was not much people on the beach. We decide to swim and after we play some games, I really think it was a great day. I forget to bring my camera so I only take photos with my phone. Honestly, I think everyone should visit this place at least 3 times.

clips.source: recorded in a dogfooding drill, 'three' said correctly

clips.name: drill-three-as-free
clips.source: recorded in a dogfooding drill, 'three' said as 'free' (θ to f)
